send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

promotions.title: Promo Exclusions
content:
• Can't be applied to bundles

• Codes can be applied on sale items but are not valid during sitewide sales

send_to_cs: Send to CS for coupon code requests
escalate: Always include the cx name & email in your ESC notes
ESC to confirm accurate product measurements for the cx
ESC immediately if the cx mentions the code EMPLOYEE50
dos_and_donts: They don't offer callbacks, don't suggest this to cx
promo_and_exclusions: SuperCircle Credits can be used at any time on any items (regular, discounted/on sale) and even during sitewide sales
SuperCircle Credits can't be combined with another discount code at the same time
Customers can apply discount codes to items that are on sale if its a discount code specific to the sale.

conversation.message_text: tentree: Reply Y to subscribe to recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from tentree.
tentree: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/wGm
tentree: Welcome! Your 15% off code is 4m4xv9-88zztz. Click here to automatically apply it and shop now: https://tentree.attn.tv/aA7ss7IEAurW

tentree: Hey , this is Jordan. Thanks for checking out our site! 😊 https://tentree.attn.tv/ax_Id3oOlxMR 

Any questions I can answer for you?
tentree: Save our contact info to make sure you don't miss out on future deals!

tentree: Hey, we'd love to get to know you better. Reply back with a number to tell us which products you're most interested in:

1 for Women’s
2 for Men’s
3 for Accessories
4 for Kid’s
5 for I’m interested in multiple categories
tentree: If you need additional help please reach us at support@tentree.com or reply "Service" to this message. Text STOP to opt out.

Hey Jordan, maybe you can help me with an issue I'm having. I recently participated in your recycling program via SuperCircle and was given a code to use my credits there on a purchase with tentree. But each time I copy/paste the code on the checkout page, I get an error message saying it's an invalid code. Do you know what the issue might be?
Service

tentree: Thanks for letting me know, and we appreciate your participation in our recycling program! I'm sorry the code you're given isn't working, though. Which specific item/s are you applying it to, please?
This is my cart at the moment
tentree: Thank you for sharing the details. Can you try logging in to your account first before adding items to your cart?

I don't actually have a tentree account yet (assumed I'd create one during the order process). I do have a tentree.supercircle account that I'm currently logged into. Should I create a tentree account using the same email address as that account?
tentree: Sorry for the confusion, that should be fine if you don't create another account. Can you try removing the Quarter Sock, and then applying your code again, please? Let me know how that goes!

promotions.title: OPH10 (Unique)
content:
Promo Name - Birthday Trigger Consolation
Code: OPH10_	
Discount: $10 off $50 Purchase			

• Eligible for customers who text in, have already provided their birthday and had their birthday within the last 30 days.

• Eligible for customers who would otherwise have to wait a full year for the automated birthday trigger.

• If the customer has never purchased before, remind them to use their New Customer Welcome Code first before applying the Birthday Trigger.

Exclusions:
• Icons Collection
• Bowery Leather Bomber
• Suede Bomber Jacket
• Super 150s Premium Suit

coupons.name: 2025 - SPCL25 - OCTOBER PRIME DAY SMS ONLY

tone: Close journey replies asking customers to text in their birthday to receive a gift
dos_and_donts: Offer help if the customer replies back to the automated message with number 0
templates: For checkout issues use COI shortcut
If the site doesn't accept the customers payment method use PME shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: The welcome code can be applied to discounted items
For issues with the code GETSTARTED15 use GSE shortcut
The 20% off welcome offer will automatically be added at checkout for their first order

Template used: "I’m having trouble checking out!"; last updated: 2024-07-17 16:06:03.017

Bonobos: We can definitely help you troubleshoot here! First, if you could double-check that you're using the web browsers "Google Chrome" or "Mozilla Firefox", that would be great. We find that our website works best on these browsers, as
opposed to others like "Safari" which may result in a less-than-smooth user experience.

Second, please check if you have stable internet connection. You may need to clear your browser's caches and cookies.

Let us know if you have any more questions. Thank you!
